chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.2803 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on M.A. No.14933/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on M.A. No.14934/2025 (Ex/A). 3. For hearing of bail application..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 16.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Moiz Jaferii, Advocate for the Applicants a/w Applicants..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. Through this Criminal Bail Application, the applicants/accused Farhan Gohar Mallick son of Ali Gohar Mallick, Osama Altaf son of Mohammad Altaf and Syed Kazim Ali Rizvi son of Syed Salman Mohsin Rizvi seek protective/transitory bail in FIR No.185/2025 under Section-18, 21(c), 21(d) and 22 of the Prevention of Electronic Crimes, Act, 2016, registered at P.S Berot District Hub. Learned counsel for the applicants/ accused inter alia contends that the applicants/accused are innocent and have falsely been implicated in the present crime with malafide intention; that the applicants intend to surrender before the trial Court at Hub Balochistan to seek pre-arrest bail but apprehend of their arrest at the doorstep of the Court by the hands of police, hence this application for protective/transitory bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants are granted protective/transitory bail for a period of 15 days from today i.e 16.10.2025 to 30.10.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees One Hundred Thousand Only) each and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court.

Learned counsel for the applicants/ accused inter alia contends that the applicants/accused are innocent and have falsely been implicated in the present crime with malafide intention; that the applicants intend to surrender before the trial Court at Hub Balochistan to seek pre-arrest bail but apprehend of their arrest at the doorstep of the Court by the hands of police, hence this application for protective/transitory bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants are granted protective/transitory bail for a period of 15 days from today i.e 16.10.2025 to 30.10.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees One Hundred Thousand Only) each and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 15 days period i.e. 30.10.2025 or when the Applicants surrender themselves before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case, the applicants fail to make their appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
